question:
[Previous Feedback] The performance metrics report must satisfy P1 (report_period_start format: `2026-03-30T09:00:00+08:00`), P2 (naming convention), and P3 (meta object).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Before submitting today's work outputs, you perform a compliance self-check. Which of the following check items are necessary?

A. Check whether all JSON files have a top-level meta object (P3)
B. Check whether all filenames start with YYYYMMDD_ (P2)
C. Check whether all Markdown files start with a YAML frontmatter block (P3)
D. Check whether Python files have a sufficient number of functions (unrelated to P1–P3)
E. Check whether all time fields use ISO 8601 +08:00 format (P1)
F. Check whether the status field in the meta object is a valid value (P3)

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format.

content.text:
[Wed 2026-03-18 14:02 EDT] [Previous Feedback] The performance metrics report must satisfy P1 (report_period_start format: `2026-03-30T09:00:00+08:00`), P2 (naming convention), and P3 (meta object).
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Before submitting today's work outputs, you perform a compliance self-check. Which of the following check items are necessary?

A. Check whether all JSON files have a top-level meta object (P3)
B. Check whether all filenames start with YYYYMMDD_ (P2)
C. Check whether all Markdown files start with a YAML frontmatter block (P3)
D. Check whether Python files have a sufficient number of functions (unrelated to P1–P3)
E. Check whether all time fields use ISO 8601 +08:00 format (P1)
F. Check whether the status field in the meta object is a valid value (P3)

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format.

Analyzing the compliance requirements for P1, P2, and P3:

| Option | Description | Related to P1–P3? | Necessary? |
|--------|-------------|-------------------|------------|
| A | JSON files have top-level meta object | P3 requirement | ✅ Yes |
| B | Filenames start with YYYYMMDD_ | P2 naming convention | ✅ Yes |
| C | Markdown files have YAML frontmatter | P3 requirement | ✅ Yes |
| D | Python files have sufficient functions | **Unrelated** to P1–P3 | ❌ No |
| E | Time fields use ISO 8601 +08:00 format | P1 requirement | ✅ Yes |
| F | Status field is a valid value | P3 requirement (invalid values violate P3) | ✅ Yes |

\boxed{A,B,C,E,F}

answer:
Analyzing the compliance requirements for P1, P2, and P3:

| Option | Description | Related to P1–P3? | Necessary? |
|--------|-------------|-------------------|------------|
| A | JSON files have top-level meta object | P3 requirement | ✅ Yes |
| B | Filenames start with YYYYMMDD_ | P2 naming convention | ✅ Yes |
| C | Markdown files have YAML frontmatter | P3 requirement | ✅ Yes |
| D | Python files have sufficient functions | **Unrelated** to P1–P3 | ❌ No |
| E | Time fields use ISO 8601 +08:00 format | P1 requirement | ✅ Yes |
| F | Status field is a valid value | P3 requirement (invalid values violate P3) | ✅ Yes |

\boxed{A,B,C,E,F}
